SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

Class ADSUtils

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.ADSUtils
public class ADSUtils extends Object
Utility functions supporting Automated Data Submission (ADS) services in IZ Gateway Hub
Author:
Audacious Inquiry

  • Method Details

    • mapFacilityId

      public static String mapFacilityId(String facilityId, String principal)
      Given a Facility Identifier, get it's associated principal identifier.
      Parameters:
      facilityId - The facility ID
      principal - The name of the principal
      Returns:
      A string identifying the facility.

    • mapFromOrganization

      public static String mapFromOrganization(String organization)
      Given an Organization Name, get it's associated principal identifier.
      Parameters:
      organization - The organization name
      Returns:
      A string identifying the facility.

    • isFacilityIdValidForSender

      public static boolean isFacilityIdValidForSender(String facilityId, String principal)
      Compare the facility id to the sender principal. In the future, this may integrate with access control to determine if a given principal can send on behalf of a given facility (e.g., uploads for MAA are allowed to be sent by "maiis.mass.gov"). NOTE: For now, this is generally always true.
      Parameters:
      facilityId - The CDC assigned identifier
      principal - The principal associated with the request
      Returns:
      true if the facility can be sent to by the given principal

    • validateFilename

      public static boolean validateFilename(String filename)
      Check filenames for invalid characters
      Parameters:
      filename - The filename
      Returns:
      True if no invalid characters are found.

    • createUrl

      public static URI createUrl(URI base, Metadata meta) throws URISyntaxException
      Create a URI for an ADS Endpoint from metadata
      Parameters:
      base - The base URI
      meta - The metadata
      Returns:
      The constructed URI
      Throws:
      URISyntaxException - If the URL has a syntax error

    • getPath

      public static String getPath(URI base, Metadata meta)
      Construct the file path to a blob from it's metadata. NOTE: This is the original NDLP v1 Construction, this might change for most recent code base
      Parameters:
      base - The base URI
      meta - The metadata for the submission
      Returns:
      The path to use for the blob

    • getAzureToken

      public static String getAzureToken(String password) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault
      Azure tokens may be locked to an IP Address. For dev and test environments, we have TWO different IP addresses requests can come from. This method will extract the password based on the IP egress address of the system that is currently running. This is a bit of a hack, but is ONLY needed for dev and test environments that emerge from multiple regions or zones. If more than two egress addresses are used, the DB might need to be updated to support longer password strings.
      Parameters:
      password -
      Returns:
      The appropriate token to use for an Azure blob store.
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.SecurityFault

    • getMyIpAddress

      public static String getMyIpAddress()
      Call a web service to get this server's egress IP Address. Tries checkip.amazonaws.com and ipv4.icanhazip.com, both of which should be highly reliable.
      Returns:
      The egress IP Address of this system.

    • getEgressPoint

      public static String getEgressPoint()
      Returns:
      The egress IP address for this instance.
